name: Pizza Alla Ferrovia
recipeIngredient: 1 can Italian tuna, drained of oil and crumbled (about 6 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 424 degrees F.
2. Dust a clean work surface lightly with flour. Place the entire dough on the surface, spread it out, and flatten with fingers or a rolling pin until you form a large rectangle (about 12 inches by 15 inches, and 1/4 inch to 3/8 inch thick).
3. Dust the sheet pan with flour and place the dough on the pan, stretching it to reach all sides.
4. Using a kitchen spoon, smooth a thin layer of tomato sauce over the pizza dough all the way to the edges.
5. Sprinkle with olives.
6. Place mozzarella and crumbled tuna over the entire rectangle.
7. Sprinkle with hot pepper flakes.
8. Bake for 20 minutes, or until golden brown on the bottom and cheese is melted.
9. Remove from oven and serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
